CustomField.formula: /* check first 3 character of type__c */ case( LEFT(Text(leaseworks__Type__c),3), 'LLP' , null ,'Hea' , leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__FH_FC__c ,'C-Ch' , leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__FH_FC__c ,'Oth' , leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__FH_FC__c , leaseworks__Assembly__r.leaseworks__FH_FC__c)
CustomField.label: Current FH:FC
